import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(tokens)
  while i < n
    match list.get(tokens, i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
